name: Dip in Sour Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except bread, together.
2. Carefully scoop out a large hollow through the top of the sourdough and fill with the dip mixture.
3. Cover loaf with aluminum foil and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
4. Cube the bread taken from the centre of the loaf and serve with the dip.
